name: SA Filament – ABS 1.75mm (1kg)
description:
Product Details
Weight: 1.00 kg

What is affordable, high-quality, manufactured right here in South Africa that everybody loves?

That is right, the one and only - SA Filament!

Created to a quality parallel to an international standard, making it a great local and easily accessible option you still want to enjoy the quality that you are familiar with, such as with global brands.

Now, many would notice that not many colour options are available currently, merely because SA Filament have chosen to first focus on creating a truly impressive product, thereafter they plan to expand their range with variety of winning solutions.

We are delighted to stock this remarkable product and provide South Africans with affordable, high-quality filament that will bring joy to users of all skill levels.

Extrude your designs into reality with SA Filament! Quality has never felt this pleasing.

ABS is a very popular material due to its low cost and good mechanical properties. ABS is known for its toughness and impact resistance, allowing you to print durable parts that will hold up to extra usage and wear.

TECHNICAL SPECIFICATIONS:

Base Polymer: Acrylonitrile Butadiene Styrene (ABS)

Net Weight: 1 KG

Shipping Weight: 1.5 KG

Diameter: 1.75mm with a tolerance of ± 0.05mm

Spool Size: diameter 200mm, inner hub 58mm & Width 55mm

PRINT SETTINGS:

Print Temperature: 220 – 250 °C, dependent on printer model

Heat Bed temperature: 95 – 110 °C

Fan: Off

Enclosure: Yes (Recommended)

Bed Adhesion: SA Filament Bed Adhesive / Magigoo / ABS Slurry / Kapton tape

Post Processing: Acetone Vaping

description:
Description

The dual resistance high-density ink used in Maxify printers is a newly developed pigment ink formulation optimised specifically for business printing. The combination of DRHD inks and Canon’s fine technology delivers professional-quality colour document printing with productive speeds.

Features

  • The high-density DRHD pigment inks ensure printed text is clear, sharp and legible while graphs are reproduced in vivid and dense colours
  • DRHD inks have outstanding fastness - so they won’t fade over time and are friction resistant too making them perfect for high-quality business documents
  • Fresh from the printer with no smudges, the DRHD inks have improved water resistance which helps prints resist bleeding when highlighted with a marker
  • The high-yield XL ink tanks print colour documents at a low cost per page
